9 CLMTSCTX CALCTD_MOTOR_SCALE_TXT Calculated Motor Scale Code CHAR 5 A preliminary calculation made prior to determining the CMG group. The motor score is based upon 12 variables that are taken from Item 39 on the IRF-PAI form.
10 ORGASIID ORGNL_ASMT_INT_ID Encrypted D189Original Assessment Internal ID CHAR 10 Original version (ASMT INT ID) of this assessment where Correction Number is 00.
